name: gg-nakama-server
description: Nakama runtime module — match handlers and RPCs for the GG world.

scripts.build: node scripts/gen-data.js && npx tsc && cat build/data.gen.js build/skills/types.js build/skills/skill_*.js build/main.js > build/index.js && rm -rf build/data.gen.js build/skills build/main.js
